whatsNext.title: What would you like to do next?
whatsNext.summary: You've completed {completed} of {total} activities in this course.
whatsNext.retryDescription: Clear your progress and start fresh
whatsNext.pickAnotherDescription: Browse available lessons in the sidebar
whatsNext.reviewProgressDescription: See how you're doing across the course
whatsNext.startOverDescription: Reset all progress and begin again
whatsNext.continueAnywayDescription: Move on without completing this lesson
whatsNext.continueAnywayConfirm: Are you sure? You may miss important content.
wipe.title: Clear this lesson's progress?
wipe.body: This will reset your answers and score for this lesson. Your progress in other lessons won't change.
progression.linearStrictDescription: Learner must complete each lesson before advancing
progression.failOpenDescription: Show encouraging options when criteria aren't met
progression.openAlwaysDescription: Learner can navigate freely to any lesson
